X API 403 Forbidden. Possible causes:
  1. App permissions must be "Read and Write" in developer.x.com
  2. Access Token + Secret must be regenerated AFTER changing permissions
  3. Free tier: check that your app has tweet.write access
  4. Your X Developer account/app may be suspended or restricted
  Detail: {"detail":"You are not permitted to perform this action.","type":"about:blank","title":"Forbidden","status":403}
